UserProfile.title: UserProfile
UserProfile.description: Represents a user of the AgriWise application, such as a farmer, government authority, or logistics provider. Stores essential profile information and preferences.

id.description: Unique identifier for the UserProfile entity.

name.description: The full name of the user.

email.description: The email address of the user (optional, for communication).

phoneNumber.description: The primary contact phone number for the user.

addressCity.description: The city where the user primarily resides, used for location-based services like Mandi price mapping and local alerts.

addressState.description: The state where the user primarily resides.

preferredLanguage.description: The user's preferred language for the application interface and voice interactions (e.g., 'en', 'hi', 'bho').

role.description: The role of the user within the system (e.g., 'farmer', 'government_authority', 'logistics_provider', 'expert').

savedCropIds.description: References to Crop entities that the user has marked as 'saved' to receive personalized price change alerts. (Relationship: UserProfile N:N Crop)

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the user profile was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the user profile was last updated.

ExpertProfile.title: ExpertProfile
ExpertProfile.description: Represents an agricultural expert or NGO authorized to review and certify diagnostic suggestions and traditional remedies.

id.description: Unique identifier for the ExpertProfile entity.

userId.description: Reference to the associated UserProfile for this expert. (Relationship: UserProfile 1:1 ExpertProfile)

specialization.description: The area of agricultural expertise (e.g., 'Agronomy', 'Horticulture', 'Pest Management', 'Soil Science').

organization.description: The name of the organization or NGO the expert is affiliated with.

certificationNumber.description: A unique certification or license number for the expert, if applicable.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the expert profile was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the expert profile was last updated.

Crop.title: Crop
Crop.description: Represents an agricultural crop, detailing its characteristics for diagnostic tools, market intelligence, and general information.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Crop entity.

name.description: The common name of the crop (e.g., 'Wheat', 'Paddy', 'Guava', 'Safflower').

scientificName.description: The scientific (botanical) name of the crop.

type.description: The classification type of the crop (e.g., 'Cereal', 'Fruit', 'Vegetable', 'Legume', 'Oilseed').

description.description: A brief description of the crop, its uses, or cultivation notes.

imageUri.description: URI to an image representing the crop.

commonPestIds.description: References to common Pest entities known to affect this crop. (Relationship: Crop N:N Pest)

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the crop record was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the crop record was last updated.

Pest.title: Pest
Pest.description: Represents an agricultural pest or disease, including its characteristics, symptoms, and associated images.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Pest entity.

name.description: The common name of the pest or disease (e.g., 'Aphid', 'Blight', 'Rust').

scientificName.description: The scientific name of the pest or pathogen.

type.description: The classification type of the pest (e.g., 'Insect', 'Fungus', 'Bacterium', 'Weed', 'Virus').

description.description: A detailed description of the pest, its life cycle, and impact on crops.

symptomsDescription.description: Description of the symptoms observed on affected crops due to this pest.

imageUri.description: URI to an image illustrating the pest or its damage.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the pest record was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the pest record was last updated.

Remedy.title: Remedy
Remedy.description: Represents a traditional 'Desi Nuskha' remedy suggested for crop issues, including ingredients, instructions, and community feedback.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Remedy entity.

name.description: The common name of the traditional remedy.

description.description: A brief description or overview of the remedy and its intended use.

ingredients.description: A list of ingredients required to prepare the remedy.

instructions.description: Detailed, step-by-step instructions on how to prepare and apply the remedy.

targetPestIds.description: References to Pest entities that this remedy is known to be effective against. (Relationship: Remedy N:N Pest)

targetCropIds.description: References to Crop entities for which this remedy is suitable. (Relationship: Remedy N:N Crop)

suggestedByUserId.description: Reference to the UserProfile who originally suggested or contributed this remedy (optional, for community-sourced remedies). (Relationship: UserProfile 1:N Remedy)

upvotes.description: The total count of positive votes ('upvotes') received from the community for this remedy.

downvotes.description: The total count of negative votes ('downvotes') received from the community for this remedy.

isCertified.description: Indicates whether this remedy has been reviewed and certified by an agricultural expert.

certifiedByExpertId.description: Reference to the ExpertProfile who certified this remedy, if applicable. (Relationship: ExpertProfile 1:N Remedy)

certifiedAt.description: Timestamp when the remedy was certified by an expert.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the remedy record was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the remedy record was last updated.

ChemicalSolution.title: ChemicalSolution
ChemicalSolution.description: Represents a chemical pesticide or fungicide solution, providing details on its composition, application, and safety.

id.description: Unique identifier for the ChemicalSolution entity.

name.description: The commercial name of the chemical solution.

activeIngredients.description: A list of active chemical ingredients present in the solution.

applicationInstructions.description: Detailed instructions for proper application, including dosage, timing, and method.

safetyPrecautions.description: Safety guidelines and precautions for handling, storing, and using the chemical solution.

targetPestIds.description: References to Pest entities that this chemical solution is effective against. (Relationship: ChemicalSolution N:N Pest)

targetCropIds.description: References to Crop entities on which this chemical solution can be safely and effectively applied. (Relationship: ChemicalSolution N:N Crop)

manufacturer.description: The manufacturer or brand of the chemical solution.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the chemical solution record was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the chemical solution record was last updated.

DiagnosticResult.title: DiagnosticResult
DiagnosticResult.description: Stores the detailed outcome of an AI-driven crop and pest diagnostic query, including user input, AI analysis, and suggested solutions.

id.description: Unique identifier for the DiagnosticResult entity.

userId.description: Reference to the UserProfile who submitted the diagnostic query. (Relationship: UserProfile 1:N DiagnosticResult)

cropId.description: Reference to the Crop entity identified or specified in the diagnostic query. (Relationship: Crop 1:N DiagnosticResult)

symptomsReported.description: A textual description of symptoms and observations provided by the user.

imageUris.description: URIs to images uploaded by the user to aid in the diagnosis.

aiDiagnosticOutput.description: The primary diagnosis or summary generated by the AI engine.

suggestedPestIds.description: References to Pest entities identified by the AI as potential causes. (Relationship: DiagnosticResult N:N Pest)

suggestedRemedyIds.description: References to traditional Remedy entities suggested by the AI. (Relationship: DiagnosticResult N:N Remedy)

suggestedChemicalSolutionIds.description: References to ChemicalSolution entities suggested by the AI. (Relationship: DiagnosticResult N:N ChemicalSolution)

aiReasoning.description: A textual explanation of the AI's logic and reasoning behind its diagnosis and suggestions.

isCertified.description: Indicates whether this diagnostic result has been reviewed and certified by an agricultural expert.

certifiedByExpertId.description: Reference to the ExpertProfile who certified this diagnostic result, if applicable. (Relationship: ExpertProfile 1:N DiagnosticResult)

certifiedAt.description: Timestamp when the diagnostic result was certified by an expert.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the diagnostic result record was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the diagnostic result record was last updated.

MandiPrice.title: MandiPrice
MandiPrice.description: Stores real-time and historical wholesale market prices for crops in various market centers, crucial for market intelligence and alerts.

id.description: Unique identifier for the MandiPrice entity.

cropId.description: Reference to the Crop entity for which the price is recorded. (Relationship: Crop 1:N MandiPrice)

marketCenterName.description: The name of the market center (Mandi) where the price was recorded (e.g., 'Delhi Azadpur Mandi').

state.description: The state where the market center is located.

district.description: The district where the market center is located, providing finer geographical granularity for price data.

pricePerUnit.description: The wholesale price of the crop per specified unit.

unit.description: The unit of measure for the price (e.g., 'Quintal', 'Kg', 'Tonne').

priceDate.description: The date for which the price is valid, typically representing a daily closing price.

priceTrend.description: The identified trend for the crop price ('Rising', 'Stable', 'Falling') compared to the previous period.

previousPrice.description: The price recorded on the previous day or period for comparison to calculate the trend and detect significant changes.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the Mandi price record was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the Mandi price record was last updated.

PriceAlert.title: PriceAlert
PriceAlert.description: Records instances where a significant crop price change triggers an alert for specific users or government authorities.

id.description: Unique identifier for the PriceAlert entity.

userId.description: Reference to the UserProfile targeted by this alert (for 'Farmer Saved Crop' alerts). Null if for government authority. (Relationship: UserProfile 1:N PriceAlert)

cropId.description: Reference to the Crop entity whose price change triggered the alert. (Relationship: Crop 1:N PriceAlert)

marketCenterName.description: The market center where the significant price change occurred.

oldPrice.description: The previous price of the crop that was observed before the change.

newPrice.description: The new, current price of the crop that triggered the alert.

percentageChange.description: The calculated percentage change in price that triggered the alert.

alertType.description: The type of alert, indicating the target audience or reason ('GovernmentAuthority', 'FarmerSavedCrop').

status.description: The current status of the alert ('Pending', 'Sent', 'Acknowledged', 'Failed').

messageContent.description: The full message content to be delivered, especially for voice alerts (e.g., 'The price for Wheat in your local Mandi has increased to ₹2,200').

triggeredAt.description: Timestamp when the price change was detected and the alert was triggered.

sentAt.description: Timestamp when the alert message was successfully sent to the recipient(s).

LogisticsProvider.title: LogisticsProvider
LogisticsProvider.description: Represents a company or individual offering specialized transport services for agricultural produce in the integrated logistics marketplace.

id.description: Unique identifier for the LogisticsProvider entity.

name.description: The registered name of the logistics provider.

contactPerson.description: The primary contact person for the logistics provider.

phoneNumber.description: Contact phone number for the logistics provider.

email.description: Contact email address for the logistics provider.

address.description: The physical address of the logistics provider's main office or hub.

website.description: Optional website URL for the logistics provider.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the logistics provider record was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the logistics provider record was last updated.

TransportOption.title: TransportOption
TransportOption.description: Details a specific transport service offered by a logistics provider, including vehicle type, capacity, and pricing.

id.description: Unique identifier for the TransportOption entity.

providerId.description: Reference to the LogisticsProvider entity offering this transport option. (Relationship: LogisticsProvider 1:N TransportOption)

vehicleType.description: The type of vehicle used for this service (e.g., 'Truck', 'Mini-truck', 'Tractor-trailer', 'Van').

capacityKg.description: The maximum load capacity of the vehicle in kilograms.

pricePerKm.description: The price charged per kilometer for this transport option (e.g., in INR).

minLoadKg.description: The minimum load capacity in kilograms required or supported for this transport option.

originLocations.description: A list of cities, districts, or regions from which this transport option typically operates or picks up cargo.

destinationLocations.description: A list of cities, districts, or regions to which this transport option typically delivers cargo.

description.description: A brief description of the transport service, including any special conditions or features.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the transport option record was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the transport option record was last updated.

Post.title: Post
Post.description: Represents a social network post created by a user in the Kisan Social Network community feed.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Post entity.

userId.description: Reference to the UserProfile who created the post. (Relationship: UserProfile 1:N Post)

content.description: The textual content or message of the post.

imageUris.description: URIs to images attached to the post (optional).

location.description: Optional location information associated with the post, if relevant.

likesCount.description: The total number of 'likes' or positive reactions this post has received.

commentsCount.description: The total number of comments associated with this post.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the post was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the post was last updated.

Comment.title: Comment
Comment.description: Represents a comment made by a user on a social network post.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Comment entity.

postId.description: Reference to the Post entity to which this comment belongs. (Relationship: Post 1:N Comment)

userId.description: Reference to the UserProfile who made the comment. (Relationship: UserProfile 1:N Comment)

content.description: The textual content of the comment.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the comment was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the comment was last updated.

PestSighting.title: PestSighting
PestSighting.description: Records a user-reported sighting of a pest or disease outbreak, including location and affected crops, for crowdsourced real-time maps.

id.description: Unique identifier for the PestSighting entity.

userId.description: Reference to the UserProfile who reported the pest sighting. (Relationship: UserProfile 1:N PestSighting)

pestId.description: Reference to the Pest entity if the pest was identified from the existing database (optional). (Relationship: Pest 1:N PestSighting)

reportedPestDescription.description: A free-text description of the pest or observed symptoms provided by the user, especially if not identified by `pestId`.

imageUris.description: URIs to images uploaded by the user illustrating the reported pest or affected crops.

latitude.description: The latitude coordinate (GPS) of the pest sighting location.

longitude.description: The longitude coordinate (GPS) of the pest sighting location.

severity.description: The estimated severity level of the pest infestation ('Low', 'Medium', 'High').

cropAffectedId.description: Reference to the Crop entity that is reported to be affected by this pest sighting (optional). (Relationship: Crop 1:N PestSighting)

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the pest sighting was reported.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the pest sighting record was last updated.

NuskhaVote.title: NuskhaVote
NuskhaVote.description: Records a user's upvote or downvote for a specific traditional 'Desi Nuskha' remedy, contributing to its community rating.

id.description: Unique identifier for the NuskhaVote entity.

remedyId.description: Reference to the Remedy entity that was voted on. (Relationship: Remedy 1:N NuskhaVote)

userId.description: Reference to the UserProfile who cast the vote. (Relationship: UserProfile 1:N NuskhaVote)

voteType.description: Indicates the type of vote (true for upvote, false for downvote).

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the vote was cast.

definition.description: Stores user profile information, accessible only by the owning user. The 'userId' in the path matches the 'id' field within the document and 'request.auth.uid' for authorization.

Stores expert-specific profile details. The 'expertId' in the path should correspond to a 'userId' in the `UserProfile` collection and indicates a user with the 'expert' role. Admins can create, experts can read/update their own, and public can read specific fields. Includes 'userId' field for authorization independence.
Contains a catalog of agricultural crops. These documents are publicly readable for general information and diagnostic tools, with write access restricted to administrators.
Catalogs agricultural pests and diseases. Publicly readable for diagnostic purposes, with write access restricted to administrators.

Stores traditional remedies ('Desi Nuskha'). Publicly readable, with special write access for users who suggested them (for edits before certification) and experts (for certification). Includes denormalized 'upvotes', 'downvotes', 'isCertified', and 'certifiedByExpertId' fields for authorization independence and efficient querying.
Lists chemical pesticide/fungicide solutions. Publicly readable for reference in diagnostic suggestions, with write access restricted to administrators.

Stores the results of AI-driven diagnostic queries for a specific user. Accessible only by the owning user (read/write) or certified experts (read/certify). Includes denormalized 'userId' and 'certifiedByExpertId' fields for authorization independence.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique ID of the user who initiated the diagnostic query.

params.name: diagnosticResultId
params.description: The unique ID of the diagnostic result.

definition.description: Contains daily wholesale market prices for crops. Publicly readable for real-time market intelligence, with write access restricted to an automated Cloud Function and administrators. Includes 'cropId', 'marketCenterName', 'state', 'district', and 'priceDate' for efficient filtering and price trend analysis.

Records significant crop price changes triggering alerts for a specific user. Accessible only by the owning user (read) and written by an automated Cloud Function. Includes denormalized 'userId', 'cropId', and 'marketCenterName' for authorization independence and efficient retrieval by the user.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique ID of the user for whom the alert is generated.

params.name: alertId
params.description: The unique ID of the price alert.

definition.description: Directory of logistics providers. Publicly readable for farmers to find transport, with write access restricted to administrators.

Details specific transport services offered by a logistics provider. Publicly readable, with write access for the owning logistics provider or administrators. Includes denormalized 'providerId' for authorization independence.

params.name: providerId
params.description: The unique ID of the logistics provider offering this option.

params.name: optionId
params.description: The unique ID of the transport option.

definition.description: Social network posts created by users. Publicly readable for the community feed, with write access restricted to the post's creator or administrators. Includes denormalized 'userId', 'likesCount', and 'commentsCount' fields for authorization independence and efficient display.

Comments on social network posts. Publicly readable, with write access restricted to the comment's creator or administrators. Includes denormalized 'userId' and 'postId' fields for authorization independence and direct access.

params.name: postId
params.description: The unique ID of the post the comment belongs to.

params.name: commentId
params.description: The unique ID of the comment.

definition.description: Crowdsourced reports of pest and disease sightings. Publicly readable for real-time outbreak maps, with write access restricted to the user who reported it or administrators. Includes denormalized 'userId', 'latitude', and 'longitude' for authorization independence and geo-query capabilities.

Records a user's vote (upvote/downvote) on a traditional remedy. Primarily for tracking a user's individual votes and preventing duplicates. Write access restricted to the voting user. Includes denormalized 'userId' and 'remedyId' for authorization independence. Aggregated vote counts are stored in the parent `Remedy` document.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique ID of the user who cast the vote.

params.name: voteId
params.description: The unique ID of the vote entry.

definition.description: A collection used for DBAC. The existence of a document at `/roles_experts/{userId}` signifies that the user with 'userId' has the 'expert' role. Only administrators can write to this collection.

A collection used for DBAC. The existence of a document at `/roles_government_authority/{userId}` signifies that the user with 'userId' has the 'government_authority' role. Only administrators can write to this collection.

A collection used for DBAC. The existence of a document at `/roles_logistics_provider/{userId}` signifies that the user with 'userId' has the 'logistics_provider' role. Only administrators can write to this collection.
A collection used for DBAC. The existence of a document at `/roles_admin/{userId}` signifies that the user with 'userId' has the 'admin' role. Only administrators can write to this collection.

firestore.reasoning:
The Firestore structure is designed following the core principles of Authorization Independence, Structural Segregation, and Access Modeling, ensuring a secure, scalable, and debuggable system for AgriWise.Authorization Independence is achieved primarily through denormalization. For any subcollection where access depends on a parent document's attributes (e.g., ownership), the relevant attribute (like `userId` or `providerId`) is explicitly duplicated in every document within that subcollection. For instance, `DiagnosticResult` documents are stored under `/users/{userId}/diagnosticResults/{diagnosticResultId}` but also contain a `userId` field. This allows security rules to evaluate authorization solely based on the document itself and `request.auth.uid`, eliminating the need for expensive and insecure `get()` calls to parent documents. This design pattern also supports atomic batch operations for creating related entities without violating security rules.

Query Access Patterns (QAPs) are supported through a combination of structural segregation and direct field inclusion. Collections like `/crops`, `/pests`, `/chemicalSolutions`, `/remedies`, `/mandiPrices`, `/logisticsProviders`, and `/posts` are designed for broad public readability, allowing efficient global queries for dashboard display and marketplace listings without complex security filtering logic. For user-specific data, such as `DiagnosticResult` and `PriceAlert`, a path-based ownership model (`/users/{userId}/...`) is used. This naturally scopes queries to `request.auth.uid`, making security rules simple and efficient for `list` operations (e.g., a user can only query their own diagnostic results). Denormalized fields like `isCertified` on `Remedy` documents facilitate direct queries for certified content without needing to fetch and filter based on expert profiles. For the Mandi price update and alert system, `MandiPrice` documents include `cropId`, `marketCenterName`, `state`, and `district` which are directly queryable. `PriceAlert` documents also contain `userId`, `cropId`, and `marketCenterName` to enable direct queries for a user's specific alerts. Role-based access control (DBAC) is implemented using existence checks on dedicated role collections (e.g., `/roles_experts/{userId}`), allowing efficient rule evaluation without custom claims. This robust structure ensures that all data access patterns are explicitly supported and secured.
